ACCESSION ON BEHALF OF

THE UNITED STATES OF AMERICA

I, Rex W. Tillerson, Secretary of State of the United

States of America, having seen and considered the Convention relating to international exhibitions signed at Paris on

November 22, 1928, and supplemented by the Protocols of

May 10, 1948, November 16, 1966, and November 30, 1972, the

Amendment of June 24, 1982, and the Amendment of May 31, 1988 ("the Convention"), do hereby approve accession of the

United States of

America to the Convention, subject to the

following:

1.

2.

A reservation with respect to paragraph (2) of

Article 10 of the Convention that the obligation of the United States thereunder will be to guarantee fulfillment of its own obligations and, with respect to juristic persons officially recognized by it for the purpose of organizing expositions,

to make every reasonable effort to fulfillment by them of their

obligations; and

In accordance with paragraph (5) of Article 34 of the Convention, the United states declares itself not bound by the provisions of paragraphs (3) and

(4) of Article 34.

DONE at Washington this ninth day of May, 2017.
